titleStmt.title: SII 35.24: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 24. (A.R. No. 75 of 1951-52.) BĀḶAMBĪḌ, KOD TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone (No. II) set up near the Vishaharēśvara temple.

This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalla, is dated in the Chālukya Vikrama year 4, Siddhārtha, Pushya, Amāvāsye, Sunday, solar eclipse, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, Vyatīpāta corresponding to A.D. 1079, December 26, the weekday was Thursday.

This inscription introduces his Yuvarāja Trailokyamalla. Bīra-Noḷaṁba Jayasiṁhadēva is described with various epithets such as ruling over Banavase-12000, Sāntaḷige-1000, Puligere-300 and other divisions. Daṇḍanāyaka Baladēvayya is then introduced as holding the perggaḍe-ship. Ni[di]ya Kētiseṭṭi and Rēvakabbe are stated to have donated with great devotion one guṇiga mattar land after purchasing it for ten Lokki-gadyāṇa ponnus to god Paṇḍaraṅgēśvara which was a great magnificient linga [mahādivyaliṅga]. The land was purchased from the Mahājanas of Piriya-Keṟeyūr represented by Kaṇabba Nāṇayya, Chāvuṇḍayya (son) of Biṭṭayya and Mādhavayya of Dāsamayya who had assembled on the occasion. The land purchased formerly belonged to Jannikabbe. Sēnabōva Saṅkimayya wrote the record and [Sātō]ja of Keṟeyūr put in the stone. Published in K.I. Vol. IV, No. 33.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁ
bhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanā
śraya śrīprithvīvallabhamahārājādhirāja paramēśvara para
mabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyabharaṇaṁ
śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivriddhi
prava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire svasti
samastabhuvanasaṁstūyamāna lōkavikhyāta pallavānvaya
śrīmahīvallabhaṁyuvarāja ṣaśaraṇara mahēśvara vikra
māṁkanuṁjayalakṣmīśaraṇāgatarakṣāmaṇi cā
ḷukyacūḍāmaṇi kadanatriṇētraṁ kṣatriya pavitraṁ matta
ṁkarājaṁ sahajamanōjaṁ ripurāyakaṭakasūṟekāṟanaṁ
kakāṟaṁ śrīmatraiḷokyamallabīranoḷaṁba jayasiṁ
hadēvara banavāsepanni¨rccāsiramumaṁ sāṁtaḷigesāyiramuṁ
beḷvalamunūṟuṁ puligeṟemunūṟuṁ sāyara sāyiramumaṁ
tta sukasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyattamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi śrīddaṇḍanā
yakabaladēvayyaṁ pe¨rggaḍetanaṁ geyyuttamire yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāra
ṇamaunānuṣṭānaparāyaṇa hōmajapasamādhisaṁpannarappa śrīmanmahāgrāmaṁ pi
riyakeṟeyūranubhavaṇekāṟa kaṇṇabbe nāṇayyaṁ biṭṭayyana cāvuṇḍayyaṁ vāsudēva
vabhaṭṭaruṁ dāsamayyana mādhavayya pramukhamahājana gosanemūlavāgi neredu
sa . kalasāsi¨rvvara sādhiṣṭitadoḷ cāḷukyavikramava¨rṣada 4 neya siddhā¨rtthasaṁvatsara
da puṣyadamāvāsyeyādityavāramuṁ sū¨ryyagrahaṇa Uttarāyana saṁkrā
ti vyatipāta kūḍida puṇyadinadaṁdu mattekaṭṭidalli jannikabbeyuṇgāyya gaḻdage sāsi¨rvva
rige pādapūjege lokkiya pattugadyāṇa ponnaṁ koṭṭu sa¨rvvabādhāparihāraṁ māḍi ma
hādivyaliṁgamumappa śrīmatpaṁṇḍaraṁgēśvara nivēdyaṁ caṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāge na
ḍavaṁtemāḍi mahābhaktiyiṁ nīdiya kētiseṭṭiyuṁ rēvakabbeyaṁ biṭṭa gaṟde guṇigana
matta 1 Iṁtīdha¨rmmamaṁ sāsi¨rvvaru pratipāḷisuvara dha¨rmmasaṁkādaṁge vāraṇāsi
kurukṣētra gaṁge śrīpa¨rvatameṁba mahā puṇyatī¨rtthasthānagaḷoḷ sāyira kavi
leyaṁ kōṁḍu koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnaṁgaḷiṁ kaṭṭisi mahāvēdapāragarappa ritvija¨rkka
ḷge Ubhayamukhiyaṁ dānaṁgoṭṭa phalamakkumidanaḷidātaṁgā mahāpuṇyatī¨rttha tī¨rttha
sthānaṁgadoḷ sāyira kavileyumaṁ sāsi¨rvvabrāhmaṇaruṁ tapōdhanarumanaḷida ma
hāpātakamakku . © . sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rmmasētūnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pāla
nīyō bhavadbhiḥ sa¨rvvānētānbhāginaḥ pā¨rttivēṁdrō bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rā
mabhaṁdraḥ . svadatta paradatta vā yō harēti vasuṁndarāṁ ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ © sēnabōvasaṁkimayyaṁ baredaṁ . maṁgaḷa . ©
keṟeyūra kalkuṭiga sātōjaṁ kaṇḍarisida . © . ©
Digital edition of SII 35.24 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
